description_long: This is a weathered, upright stone monument with a rounded top and classical architectural details, resembling a traditional gravestone or memorial obelisk. The front face features an arched inscription panel framed by two fluted pilasters with ornate capitals, and the text is engraved in a serif style, though some areas show signs of erosion. The stone surface is mottled with discoloration, patches of lichen, and visible wear, especially on the back and lower sections. The base is rectangular and robust, with a slightly projecting plinth and traces of moss or grass at the bottom edge, suggesting long-term outdoor placement. The sides are relatively plain but show the depth and solidity of the structure, with the pilasters extending down to the base. The overall appearance is solemn and historic, suitable for placement in a cemetery, park, or memorial garden.
description: A weathered stone memorial obelisk with a rounded top, engraved front, and classical pilasters, set on a sturdy rectangular base with signs of age and outdoor exposure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the obelisk, the fluted pilaster, and the rounded top with visible weathering.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing a plain, heavily weathered stone surface with patches of discoloration and erosion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the pilaster detail and the curvature of the top, with moss at the base.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the engraved inscription, arched panel, and decorative pilasters framing the text.
attribute_inscription: The front face contains an engraved inscription in English, set within an arched panel. The text is in a serif font and is partially legible, though some areas are worn and difficult to read.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative fluted pilasters with ornate capitals flank the inscription panel on the front. No other ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is rectangular and solid, with a slightly projecting plinth. It is simple in design but robust, with some moss and weathering at the lower edges.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and smoothly finished, with no additional decoration or unique features.
